features: 【Safe】Quality is our top priority.Bag made of 100% high quality recyclable strength cardboard , non-toxic and odorless.

【Ingenious Design】Vision is the first attraction.Our Easter gift bags all feature chic and original designs,with a grand and bright appearance which makes the favor bag to be a brilliant decoration for your party or celebration.

【Wide Application】Do you think our gift bags only have a gorgeous appearance? No! It can not only be used to hold some Easter gifts and give them to your family、friends、and your lover，but can also be used multiple times in supermarket shopping, storing items, and other aspects！

【Gcardist Concept】Gcardist adheres to the principle of customer first, Conceptualizing the most innovative and unique designs, Using the highest quality materials, Attract the most tasteful people.We entrust the greatest warmth and blessings to our products, hoping that those who receive our products can experience love and care.
